full_text:
Feng Xi (Zirou) 馮熙 (子柔)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Feng Xi (馮熙), styledZirou (子柔), was born in Yingchuan. Used as a historian by Sun Quan and as a diplomat to both Shu and Wei. Feng Xi was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
